DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-21-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Jacob D. Colvin; Phillips, Spallas & Angstadt LLP; 415-278-9400; appearing as counsel for defendant Leslie MacKay.
Kete P. Barnes; Brown Neri Smith & Khan LLP; 310-593-9890; appearing as counsel for plaintiff Parastoo Emami.

Mr. Colvin contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT LESLIE MACKAY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED, in part and OVERRULED, in part. Defendant's Demurrer to the Second Cause of Action for Fraudulent Concealment is OVERRULED. Defendant has 10 days from notice of entry of order to file an answer. Defendant's Demurrer to the Fourth Cause of Action for Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress is SUSTAINED. No opposition.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
